name: Sun He (Bohai)
page_title: Sun He (Bohai) 孫河 (伯海) [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was adopted into the Yu clan by Sun Jian to continue the Yu family line, which would have been maintained only through women. This contradicts the novel, which states that Sun He was adopted into the Sun clan from the Yu. [SGZ: Wu 6; Rafe]

	 Birthplace 
	Wu

	 Other Names 
	Sun Hu, Yu He

	 Name Notes 
	Sun He was adopted into the Yu clan by Sun Jian to continue the Yu family lineage, which would have continued only through women. The novel reverses this role and has him being adopted into the Sun clan from the Yu clan. Sun Hu in the online Brewitt-Taylor translation. Yu Hu in the Moss Roberts translation.

full_text:
Sun He (Bohai) 孫河 (伯海)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun He (孫河), styledBohai (伯海), was born in Wu. Investigated Sun Yi’s death but was assassinated. Adopted into Yu clan by Sun Jian. Sun He was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun He lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
